{{Youmay|the [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]]|the [[Shamed Ones|shamed]] [[Intendant caste|intendant]] [[Fal Tivvik]], or [[Domain Tivvik]]}}
[[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] '''Tivvik''' was a member of [[Domain Tivvik]] and one of six Supreme Commanders that commanded the [[Flotilla/Legends|flotilla]] sent to attack [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] during the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|Second Battle]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] ordered Tivvik and Supreme Commander [[Sla Tsun]] to drive their [[matalok]]s into Zonama Sekot.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
